TC-001.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-001","title":"Create a TestBench from an empty bench slot using a discovered spec","level":"1","preconditions":["TestBench feature is enabled in settings.","At least one bench slot is empty","The focused project repo contains at least one file matching .specifications/*/test-cases.json","User is on the bench list view for the project"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Open the option menu on an empty bench slot","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Click 'Create a TestBench' from the option menu","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"Spec-picker modal opens"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"'Create a TestBench' option is present in the menu"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Observe the discovered-specs list in the modal","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"Each discovered spec row shows slug, file path, and case count"},{"id":"S003-O02","expected":"At least one row matches a .specifications/*/test-cases.json file in the repo"}]},{"id":"S004","instruction":"Click a spec row to select it","observations":[{"id":"S004-O01","expected":"Row is highlighted as selected"},{"id":"S004-O02","expected":"Create button becomes enabled"}]},{"id":"S005","instruction":"Click the Create button","observations":[{"id":"S005-O01","expected":"Modal closes"},{"id":"S005-O02","expected":"Bench is created with a worktree bound to the selected spec"},{"id":"S005-O03","expected":"Bench detail view opens"}]},{"id":"S006","instruction":"Observe the tabs in the bench detail view","observations":[{"id":"S006-O01","expected":"A 'TestBench' tab is the first tab with an amber accent dot"},{"id":"S006-O02","expected":"Standard tabs (Components, Terminal, Info) are also present"},{"id":"S006-O03","expected":"Inspection tab is present if previously configured"}]},{"id":"S007","instruction":"Click the TestBench tab","observations":[{"id":"S007-O01","expected":"TestBench content loads"},{"id":"S007-O02","expected":"The focused spec slug and path are displayed"},{"id":"S007-O03","expected":"The results panel is visible"}]}]}

TC-002.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-002","title":"Create TestBench option is absent when the feature is disabled","level":"1","preconditions":["TestBench feature is disabled in settings","At least one bench slot is empty","User is on the bench list view"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Open the option menu on an empty bench slot","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"'Create a TestBench' option is NOT present"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"Normal bench setup options remain visible"}]}]}

TC-018.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-018","title":"Review UI renders the grouped case list and progress bar on open","level":"1","preconditions":["A plan with at least one case per level (L1-L4) is loaded","The review tab is accessible"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Navigate to the TestBench review tab for the loaded plan","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Observe the left-pane case list","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"Cases are grouped by level/priority with visible group headings"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"Each row shows a status indicator (dot and label)"},{"id":"S002-O03","expected":"Raw JSON is not exposed"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Observe the header area","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"A segmented progress bar (passed/failed/open) is visible"},{"id":"S003-O02","expected":"Mono counts are displayed"},{"id":"S003-O03","expected":"Overall progress reflects the initial not_started state"}]}]}

TC-019.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-019","title":"Case detail shows full metadata, preconditions, steps, and observations","level":"1","preconditions":["A plan is loaded with a case that has preconditions, multiple steps, and expected observations per step","The review UI is open"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Click a case row in the left pane","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Observe the right detail pane","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"Case title is displayed"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"Case id, level, and priority are shown"},{"id":"S002-O03","expected":"Preconditions list is rendered in order"},{"id":"S002-O04","expected":"Ordered steps are displayed sequentially"},{"id":"S002-O05","expected":"Each step shows its expected observations"},{"id":"S002-O06","expected":"Each observation has a pass/fail mark control"},{"id":"S002-O07","expected":"Raw JSON is not visible"}]}]}

TC-038.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-038","title":"Result marks persist across page reload","level":"1","preconditions":["A project is registered and its roubo.yaml is valid","A spec exists at .specifications/<slug>/test-cases.json with at least two cases","TestBench is open for the spec on bench-1","No prior test-results.json exists"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Mark TC-001 pass and TC-002 fail using the result controls","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Reload the browser tab","observations":[]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Re-open the TestBench tab for the same spec and bench","observations":[]},{"id":"S004","instruction":"Observe the result state","observations":[{"id":"S004-O01","expected":"TC-001 shows pass"},{"id":"S004-O02","expected":"TC-002 shows fail"},{"id":"S004-O03","expected":"No data-loss error or recovery prompt is shown"}]}]}

TC-039.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-039","title":"Result sidecar is written beside the spec in the focused project repo, not in ~/.roubo","level":"1","preconditions":["A project is registered with repoPath /path/to/project","A spec slug 'checkout-flow' exists under .specifications/checkout-flow/","TestBench is open for this spec on bench-2"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Mark any case pass","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Inspect the filesystem for the created results file","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"/path/to/project/.specifications/checkout-flow/test-results.json is created"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"No test-results.json appears anywhere under ~/.roubo"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Verify the file structure","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"That entry contains result records keyed by case id"}]}]}

TC-040.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-040","title":"Source test-cases.json is never mutated when saving results or reconciling","level":"1","preconditions":["A spec with test-cases.json exists under .specifications/my-spec/","The SHA-256 checksum of test-cases.json is recorded before the run"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Mark several cases pass and fail and add notes","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Edit the plan to trigger staleness and apply reconcile","observations":[]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Verify the SHA-256 checksum of test-cases.json against the recorded value","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"Checksum is identical: test-cases.json has zero bytes changed"},{"id":"S003-O02","expected":"Only test-results.json was written or modified"}]}]}

TC-054.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-054","title":"A conforming test-cases.json validates successfully","level":"1","preconditions":["The zod source for the test-cases schema is compiled and exported","A well-formed test-cases.json fixture exists with all required fields populated"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Load the conforming test-cases.json fixture through the validator","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"Validation returns success with zero errors"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"The parsed result matches the input fixture"}]}]}

TC-055.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-055","title":"A conforming test-results.json referencing valid case ids validates successfully","level":"1","preconditions":["The zod source for the test-results schema is compiled and exported","A well-formed test-results.json fixture references case ids present in the corresponding test-cases.json","The results file requires no edits to test-cases.json to be valid"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Load the conforming test-results.json fixture through the validator","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"Validation returns success with zero errors"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"All result entries and referenced case ids are preserved"}]}]}

TC-066.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-066","title":"TestBench tab appears in app settings and the toggle defaults to enabled","level":"1","preconditions":["Roubo is running","No prior UserPreferences entry for the TestBench toggle exists (fresh state)"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Open app settings","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Click the 'TestBench' tab","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"A 'TestBench' tile is shown with a label, description, and a switch"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"The switch is ON (enabled) by default"},{"id":"S002-O03","expected":"No 'Disabled' helper text is shown"}]}]}

TC-069.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-069","title":"E2E: toggle TestBench off, verify hidden, toggle on, verify restored","level":"1","preconditions":["Roubo is running","TestBench is enabled (toggle ON)","The main UI shows the create-TestBench option and surface"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Open app settings","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Navigate to the 'TestBench' tab","observations":[]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Observe the switch state","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"Switch is ON (amber) with no disabled helper text"}]},{"id":"S004","instruction":"Click the switch to toggle OFF","observations":[{"id":"S004-O01","expected":"Switch turns OFF"},{"id":"S004-O02","expected":"The disabled helper text appears"}]},{"id":"S005","instruction":"Close app settings and inspect the main UI","observations":[{"id":"S005-O01","expected":"The create-TestBench option is absent"},{"id":"S005-O02","expected":"The TestBench surface is not accessible"}]},{"id":"S006","instruction":"Re-open settings, navigate to the 'TestBench' tab, and toggle ON","observations":[{"id":"S006-O01","expected":"Switch turns ON"},{"id":"S006-O02","expected":"The disabled helper text is removed"}]},{"id":"S007","instruction":"Close settings and inspect the main UI","observations":[{"id":"S007-O01","expected":"The create-TestBench option is visible again"},{"id":"S007-O02","expected":"The TestBench feature surface is accessible again"}]}]}

TC-003.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-003","title":"Spec-picker modal lists all discovered test-cases.json files from the repo","level":"2","preconditions":["TestBench feature is enabled","The repo contains .specifications/alpha/test-cases.json, .specifications/beta/test-cases.json, .specifications/gamma/test-cases.json","User has opened the Create a TestBench modal"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Observe the discovered-specs list","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"Exactly three rows: alpha, beta, gamma"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"Each row shows slug, relative path, and case count"},{"id":"S001-O03","expected":"No rows from outside .specifications/ are shown"}]}]}

TC-004.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-004","title":"Create button is disabled until a spec is selected","level":"2","preconditions":["TestBench feature is enabled","User has opened the Create a TestBench modal","No spec is selected and the manual-path input is empty"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Observe the Create button state","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"Create button is visually disabled and cannot be clicked"}]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Click the Create button without making a selection","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"No bench is created"},{"id":"S002-O02","expected":"Modal remains open"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Select a spec row from the discovered list","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"Create button becomes enabled"}]}]}

TC-005.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-005","title":"TestBench tab appears first and all standard bench tabs are retained","level":"2","preconditions":["TestBench feature is enabled","A TestBench has been created and bound to a spec","The bench has Components, Terminal, Inspection, and Info tabs configured"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Navigate to the bench detail view for the TestBench","observations":[{"id":"S001-O01","expected":"The first tab is 'TestBench' with an amber accent dot"},{"id":"S001-O02","expected":"Components, Terminal, Inspection, and Info tabs are present"},{"id":"S001-O03","expected":"Tab order is TestBench, then the existing tabs in their original order"}]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Click each standard tab (Components, Terminal, Inspection, Info)","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"Each tab opens and displays its normal content without interference from TestBench"}]}]}

TC-006.caseCanon: {"id":"TC-006","title":"Create a TestBench with a valid manual file path","level":"2","preconditions":["TestBench feature is enabled","An empty bench slot exists","A valid test-cases.json exists at a known path within the registered project repo","User has opened the Create a TestBench modal"],"steps":[{"id":"S001","instruction":"Locate the manual-path input field in the modal","observations":[]},{"id":"S002","instruction":"Type a valid path to a test-cases.json within the project repo","observations":[{"id":"S002-O01","expected":"Input shows a validating indicator while the path is validated"}]},{"id":"S003","instruction":"Wait for validation to complete","observations":[{"id":"S003-O01","expected":"Input shows a green check (valid state)"},{"id":"S003-O02","expected":"Create button becomes enabled"},{"id":"S003-O03","expected":"No error message is shown"}]},{"id":"S004","instruction":"Click the Create button","observations":[{"id":"S004-O01","expected":"Modal closes"},{"id":"S004-O02","expected":"TestBench is created bound to the manually specified spec"},{"id":"S004-O03","expected":"Bench detail opens with the TestBench tab showing the correct spec path"}]}]}
